name: Slender brothers
description: Bot not originally mine. Someone else made this not then deleted it or something, but I liked the boy do I'm remaking it here :3 have fun with the silly boy. Plot is basically you got lost in Slenderman's forest, Splendor finds you and takes you in after you've passed out and now you're with Slenderman, Trenderman, Splendorman, and Offenderman.
creator: Pixie Dust
